what_was_done: TG bot /commands menu via setMyCommands, bot loads own .env for GROQ_API_KEY, gate 23 dotfile exemption fix, paired OZmaster on official TG plugin
known_issues: rate_limits statusline field null on API key billing — only works on claude.ai subscriptions
Gate 2 gap: rm -r (without -f) not blocked — equally destructive on user-owned files
Gate 23 tracker is global — cross-session pollution from concurrent instances
Validation bug: tasks.json missing cwd for external projects (writing-plans needs fix)
Custom TG bot tmux transport injects into active pane — unsafe when user is typing
next_steps: Fix gate 23: make tracker per-session instead of global
Fix writing-plans: set cwd in tasks.json for external projects
Fix gate 2: add rm -r pattern to DANGEROUS_PATTERNS
Fix custom TG bot: dedicated tmux pane for transport target
